recentTweets.text: The same people who professed to be VERY CONCERNED (TM) about Hillary Clinton using a private server for her emails haven't said a damn thing about Elon Musk downloading all of our personal information onto his private servers.

2.2 billion gallons of waters just wasted.

Remember this when you're paying sky-high prices for fruits and vegetables later this year. 

Unreal.

Trump just wasted millions of gallons of water (literally dumped in an arid lakebed where it will evaporate) to show he can "turn on the water".

When our water (and food) prices shoot up later this year, you can thank Trump.
https://t.co/Lmgk9UP1Ep

This looks like a straight up bribe to keep Trump from going after a major media organization. 

It's genuinely distressing to see how quickly our democracy is turning into a kleptocracy.

California understood the assignment.

Let’s go @AdamGrayCA!!!

I'm a bit late to this, but I wanted to state that @NancyMace's personal attacks on her new colleague are both disgusting and desperate.

I'm proud to serve with @SarahEMcBride and look forward to working with her on moving America forward, including in protecting LGBTQ rights.

Just got home after 11 days in DC for New Member Orientation. Quick update:
☑️ Had my race called
☑️ Found apartment
☑️ Selected office (Longworth 1034)
☑️ Elected Dem SoCal Region Whip

Still left to do:
⏹️ Hire Chief of Staff
⏹️ Receive Committee assignments
⏹️ Get sworn in! https://t.co/EZygXjfmVe

Thank you for the kind notes and well wishes!  

I'm in DC this week and next for New Member Orientation.  

While the national election results were not what I'd hoped for, I'm honored and humbled to be in a position to try to effect positive change. 1/ https://t.co/Kst9rCqXL8

Honored to announce our race in #CA47 has been called.

I know many of us are anxious about the future of our country, but we cannot give up on America. 

In Congress, I will fight to protect our democracy, safeguard our freedoms, and expand economic opportunity. https://t.co/BRLmgtJboI
Let's go!

The latest update from the @ocregistrar is out, and we continue to gain votes. We're now up 2,713 votes (up from 1,078 yesterday), and feeling good about our momentum.

Thank you to all our amazing supporters. We would not be in this position without you. https://t.co/1rek2TRg4z

The most recent vote tally from @OCRegistrar has put us back in the lead. With the remaining votes expected to trend our way, we’re optimistic about our chances to keep #CA47 Blue. Thank you all for your support. We wouldn’t be in this position without you. #MinForTheWin https://t.co/bVW1oMmD7k

Last night was an emotional rollercoaster, but we feel good about our race in #CA47.

We are seeing solid gains and I encourage you all to keep the faith. There is a pathway to taking the House, and it runs through California. Thank you for the faith you've placed in me. #resist

I’m hearing reports that lines at #UCI are long. Students, if you’re in line to vote, stay in line! Or grab some friends and drive to a location with shorter wait times, which you can find here: 
https://t.co/2fkltdvEJ9 https://t.co/IdVvY6hwMK

Adam Brody isn't just a pretend rabbi, he's a dad and concerned citizen who knows how important it is to stand up against MAGA extremism, both nationally and here in the OC, a place he knows a little about.

Make sure your voice is heard by making a plan to vote by Tuesday. https://t.co/gzdlkSZ52C

Thank you to @BillClinton for coming down to the OC this weekend, for a fundraiser last night and a GOTV rally this afternoon. You celebrated my son Paxton's bday and I hope you were able to get back in time to celebrate @HillaryClinton's bday as well! 1/ https://t.co/tP3miaWu66

Former President @BillClinton came out to Orange County tonight to headline an event for several of us Congressional candidates (more pictures coming!).

It also happened to be my son Paxton's birthday.

Such a special evening. Thank you Mr. President! https://t.co/volcX3Z7RC
Earlier today, I learned that some of my yard signs in Huntington Beach were defaced with racist anti-Asian slurs. My statement here: https://t.co/57QJtLhmRy

Immensely happy to report my legislation ending the sale of guns and ammunition on state property is now in effect, following the Ninth Circuit's decision yesterday to mandate enforcement of these laws.

Elections have consequences. Let's go win #CA47 and keep going!

Scott Baugh said he’d debate me, but apparently he was lying (again). He just told us he won’t do ANY debates. Why? Because he’s misrepresenting his MAGA extremism and I’ve got the receipts. Voters deserve to hear from us directly. https://t.co/c8hYGuVggw
As the Democrat who represents this area in the State Senate, who is running to represent this area in Congress, I will just say I disagree with that statement.

I’m running for Congress to build an economy that works for everyone. Because everyone deserves a fair shot at the American Dream.

Check out my first video/TV ad here: https://t.co/78q8nSq9bC

HUGE NEWS: My bill banning gun shows on CA property has been upheld in a unanimous decision by the 9th Circuit.

Read the full release here: 1/
https://t.co/ptJ9LoJfO0

Trump and his MAGA supporters are coming to Newport Beach to help my opponent Scott Baugh because they think that Orange County will be receptive to their message of corruption, racism, xenophobia, and destroying the rule of law. But this isn’t the Orange County they think it is.
This is outrageous. Donald Trump answers to Vladimir Putin, not the American people, and he is (once again) openly signaling to Putin for help in getting him elected.
Samuel Alito is an insurrectionist sympathizer who should not be on the Supreme Court, let alone authoring a decision that completely guts voting rights.

This is absolutely outrageous. Any other judge who took bribes like this, and lied about it in their disclosures, would be in jail. 

No one should be above the law.

🧵 I’m the Democrat running to succeed Katie Porter in #CA47 and I wanted to introduce myself. I beat back over $5 million in MAGA-funded attack ads to decisively win the primary. I’m battle-tested and ready to win this crucial swing seat. 1/
The real Hunter Biden scandal is the fact that @HouseOversight is refusing to investigate Jared and Ivanka.

I was shocked to learn that my legislation barring the sale of guns and ammunition on state property, including most of our fairgrounds, was enjoined by a Trump-appointed judge on the thinnest of pretense. 1/
https://t.co/DVHvbfsHYK
We’ve got a long road ahead of us, but polling shows we’re in a strong position. #CA47 https://t.co/Z2t5P56GLu

Absolutely bonkers. 

ONE IN FIVE American adults have had a family member killed by a gun, while ONE IN SIX have WITNESSED A SHOOTING.

If you're not outraged, you're part of the problem.
https://t.co/wAX3cUlU3U

Between expelling black legislators or passing new laws authorizing genital inspections of child athletes, ending all abortion access, or barring Chinese immigrants from owning property, the GOP is hard at work this week showing America exactly what it stands for. #VoteBlue2024

If we had 400 million swords in this country  and people were encouraged to wield swords in public spaces, there is no doubt we’d have lots more injuries and deaths by swords.

This isn’t hard. More guns means more gun violence.
This is very upsetting and merits a serious investigation.

It was great to meet @davidhogg111 yesterday! 

We discussed my Congressional campaign and my bill #SB637, which would require banks wanting to do business with the state of CA to divest from the gun industry. 

Thanks for all your activism on gun violence prevention, David! https://t.co/ablsCxqaRW

What's happening right now in Iran is beyond horrific. We need to do more to help the people of Iran. #MahsaAmini 
https://t.co/UC5OpzDUK4

I introduced SB  637 today, which requires that banks that want to do business with the state of California be divested from the gun industry. 

Because #EnoughIsEnough and Wall Street needs to get out of the business of funding gun violence.

Truly humbled to be endorsed by so many CA leaders from the Women's Caucus, Black Caucus, Latino Caucus, Jewish Caucus, LGBTQ Caucus, & the Asian Pacific Islander Caucus. Our diversity is our strength, & I will proudly represent all of OC in Congress.
https://t.co/c6sMlUL1WI https://t.co/dNMZRgXb54

This complaint would be a lot more compelling if we had heard *anything* from Republicans, Fox News, and the right wing media machine any of the THREE times that Chinese balloons came into US territory during the Trump administration.
https://t.co/DJLkviV3R0

Had the chance to visit DC this week, and while I forgot to take pictures at the Capitol, I felt such awe while there. It's the defining symbol of our democracy.

A pox on those who encouraged and participated in rioting, looting, and worse at the People's House. https://t.co/W7WGQyVcpQ

.@katieporteroc leaves behind an incredible legacy in the House of Representatives, one I hope to try to continue.

I am honored and grateful to be have her endorsement. https://t.co/z479K65jSC

I began my career holding Wall Street accountable during the financial crisis & protecting families from foreclosure. In the State Senate, I have fought for bold legislation to challenge politics as usual. 

Today, I'm proud to announce my candidacy for U.S. Congress. #CA47 https://t.co/Py2zqqb4iL
@SteveGoffman https://t.co/1CDagR78H9

I don't pretend to be a foreign policy expert, but I think what is happening in Ukraine right now has much more massive implications for our global political and economic order than most people are realizing. 1/
@IAPonomarenko Operation Crimea River

Putin and his gang of thugs are targeting hospitals, apartment buildings, and universities. There is no moral ambivalence here. Russia under Putin is the epitome of evil, and we must continue to wholeheartedly #StandWithUkraine.

This is an incredible, well-documented analysis that absolutely eviscerates the "originalist" claim that the Founders intended for the Second Amendment to encompass an individual right to bear arms. Worth reading in its entirety. 1/
https://t.co/CNxestSSz3 https://t.co/nIlmVRavAO

Last fall, I started a secret side project of studying for the February 2022 bar exam.

Well, the results just came back and I’m proud, and more than a bit relieved, to report that I passed! https://t.co/y2kuIrxtRn

I'm old enough to remember when the Republican Party, in response to Trump's demands, changed its 2016 Platform to specifically remove any reference to providing armed assistance to Ukraine.

Don't let them gaslight you. Trump was and is a Putin puppet.
https://t.co/A8lh1iDmVQ
Happy birthday @katieporteroc! Here's to another 48 years of oversight and kicking ass. https://t.co/iyq0cwNhrz

Was on a call with @GavinNewsom earlier this afternoon, and just when it was my turn to speak, my 5 year old jumped up onto my lap, announced to everyone that he was about to turn 6 years old, and asked the Governor for a birthday present.

THERE WAS A MEMO LAYING OUT HOW TO STEAL THE 2020 ELECTION (of course there was), written by Trump attorney and Fed Society officer John Eastman.

This is straight up sedition, folks. People need to go to prison, or we'll see a repeat of this very soon.
https://t.co/iZVN40rrpg

"California now 1 of only 3 states to exit CDC's 'high' COVID transmission category"

Remind me again why the @CAGOP wanted to spend hundreds of millions of our taxpayer dollars on this recall effort?

I'm old enough to remember when Bush43 promised our presence in Afghanistan would last a short time.

...which means I'm also old enough to remember when Trump surrendered to the Taliban last year.

...and I distinctly remember FoxNews cheerleading both of these events.

With recall ballots on the way, I've been asked by many supporters how they should vote on Question 2 (which candidate should replace Gov. Newsom if he is recalled).

The official position of the Newsom campaign is to vote NO on Question 1 and to leave Question 2 blank.

I know a lot of folks aren't paying attention to the CA recall.

But the latest polls show this is a tossup. And if the recall succeeds, we'll end up with another Trump/DeSantis type, like this anti-vaxxer, leading our state.

Ballots drop next weekend and are due by 9/14. VOTE!
Proud to be here at Huntington Beach City Hall to join the city in honoring #HarveyMilk Day by raising the #PrideFlag. #Equality https://t.co/EBugx8euLJ

This morning, I attended the gun show at the OC Fairgrounds, along with several members of the Fairground Board. As you may know, I'm sponsoring #SB264, which would end the sale of guns and ammunition on CA state property (which includes the county fairgrounds). 1/ https://t.co/VtUhaLAFDa

1) The whole point of a background check is to figure out if the gun buyer is law abiding or not.

2) We already do “background checks” on people crossing the border.

3) I’m old enough to remember when people would be embarrassed when they said something monumentally stupid.

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

This morning, I attended the gun show at the OC Fairgrounds, along with several members of the Fairground Board. As you may know, I'm sponsoring #SB264, which would end the sale of guns and ammunition on CA state property (which includes the county fairgrounds). 1/ https://t.co/VtUhaLAFDa

1) The whole point of a background check is to figure out if the gun buyer is law abiding or not.

2) We already do “background checks” on people crossing the border.

3) I’m old enough to remember when people would be embarrassed when they said something monumentally stupid.

Last year, I made a campaign promise that, if elected, the first bill I'd introduce would be to end gun shows at the OC Fairgrounds.

Well, after researching the issue, I decided to go further and end gun shows on ALL state property. #PromisesMadePromisesKept https://t.co/RJB7xbBdpT

Whether it's encouraging seditionists or refusing to wear a mask to prevent COVID spread, too many of our elected leaders are acting like spoiled, entitled brats.

Our democracy needs at least two healthy parties, which means we need some grownups in the Congressional GOP.

I'm glad Congress passed some COVID relief, but this is too little, too late. For the past 6 mos, @senatemajldr has prioritized fake election fraud claims & unqualified judges over working families. $600 is paper-thin stimulus in the midst of a pandemic.
https://t.co/ZErt6sFQCd
So I did a thing today. Thanks to you all for your support in getting us here. I am so excited to get to work in representing you! https://t.co/H7A5d2SBMn

It’s new member orientation for the State Senate! Getting to know some of my fellow new incoming colleagues (although there are still a few races still unclear as to the winner) and learning the ropes... and yes, I’m also learning where the bathrooms are! https://t.co/6BH4QKw2f9

We have an announcement in our race.

https://t.co/xGmQJNFdZe https://t.co/Kd1s0XQeTD
I'm old enough to remember when Republicans would complain about frivolous lawsuits.

COVID-19 is a nonpartisan virus, and it will not discriminate based on whether you're Republican or Democrat.

That's why it's so disheartening to see Trump & his supporters (including my opponent John Moorlach) reject masks & social distancing as if these were partisan measures.

Honored to have the endorsement of our next President @JoeBiden! Our country is at a low point in its history, but I know we can find our way again under the leadership of Joe and Kamala.

Let's do this! https://t.co/5NKrcp5Iuv

Dude, you’re the incumbent this year. You’re supposed to talk about your accomplishments, not how terrible things have gotten on your watch. 

Also, California is an amazing state and you’re going to lose here by 40 points. 😘

I can honestly say this was the first F grade I’ve ever received in my entire life.

And I’m damn proud of it.

#EndGunViolence #EnoughIsEnough #Gunsense

@MomsDemand @ca_brady @shannonrwatts https://t.co/tAJ16D22Ze

California is the 5th largest economy & had a $22 billion surplus last year. 

You want to talk about mismanagement, Mitch? Maybe you should look at your home state, which receives $148 billion more than it paid in federal taxes, while NY, NJ & CA are all massive donor states.

Just got invited to a "fundraising concert" for @AndrewYang where he'll be performing Don't You Forget About Me & Prince's When Doves Cry.

B/w this & his recent skateboarding video, he is setting an impossibly high bar for his fellow AAPI candidates.

Andrew, can you chill out?

Late to post this, but it was great to see @AndrewYang this past weekend. I really appreciate the two (!) shoutouts he gave to my campaign, including the clip below from a DNC event. So exciting to see his amazing momentum, and the enthusiasm of the #YangGang is unbelievable! https://t.co/C6dDnEihSq

Great turnout this morning at March For Our Lives/Moms Demand Action! Its been inspiring to see how far both these groups have grown over the past year. Looking forward to the all the good that will come from their hard work! https://t.co/dJ7L8Pfj7x

"I'm endorsing Dave Min for State Senate because I know he will be the partner I need in Sacramento to help California stand up to Donald Trump and lead the way for the rest of the country.”

Proud to have @RepTedLieu's endorsement! https://t.co/8hPtxol52E
